message:
Cross-package pipeline test: Artifacts fetch + blame + prompt-blame join

The capstone integration test. Exercises all three packages
(@gitmode/wasm-git, @gitmode/edge-compute-pool, prompt-blame schema)
in one Worker context to verify the envisioned production flow:

  1. fetchArtifactsCommit  → stage 12-object commit closure in R2
  2. blameWalk             → per-line attribution (line-one→A, two→C, three→B)
  3. PROMPT_BLAME_DB join  → enrich each line with prompt_id, model, agent, session

The fixture is a 3-commit linear history modifying src/foo.txt, served
through the in-memory Artifacts-shaped server. Each commit is also
pre-recorded in PROMPT_BLAME_DB with metadata simulating different
agents (claude-code, cursor) and prompts. The test verifies the joined
output matches expected shape.

A second test verifies graceful degradation: querying a repo_id that
has no metadata returns null prompt fields rather than failing.

Implementation pieces:
- vitest.config.ts: added `miniflare.d1Databases: ["PROMPT_BLAME_DB"]`
  as a test-only binding override (production edge-compute-pool doesn't
  need D1; only the cross-package test does)
- test/env.d.ts: added PROMPT_BLAME_DB type
- Inline copy of the prompt-blame schema (mirrors @gitmode/prompt-blame
  migrations/0001_init.sql) so the test is self-contained

92 tests in edge-compute-pool (was 90); 125 across all packages.
